settings.text: COMING THIS FRIDAY, JULY 5TH: Nike Air Jordan 1 Low Golf "Aegean Storm"

Summer is here, and it's the perfect time to elevate your golf game and style with the latest release from Nike. Set to release this Friday, July 5th at 7 am PST, this shoe combines iconic design with modern functionality, making it a must-have for golf enthusiasts and sneaker collectors alike.

Striking Aegean Storm Colorway

The "Aegean Storm" edition features a clean white leather base accented with vibrant blue overlays, creating a dynamic and eye-catching look. The darker blue Nike Swoosh on the sides adds a touch of contrast, while the iridescent blue Jordan Golf branding on the tongue and the classic Air Jordan Wings logo on the heels enhance the overall aesthetic.

Designed for Performance

While maintaining the iconic silhouette of the original Air Jordan 1 Low, this golf-specific version includes features that enhance performance on the green. The upper is crafted from premium leather for durability and a high-quality feel. The outsole is designed for superior traction, providing stability and grip during swings, ensuring you perform your best on the course.

Versatile Style

Despite its golf-specific enhancements, the Air Jordan 1 Low Golf "Aegean Storm" retains the sleek and stylish appearance of its basketball predecessor. This makes it versatile enough to wear both on and off the course, seamlessly transitioning from a day of golf to casual outings.

Release Details

Mark your calendars and set your alarms! The Air Jordan 1 Low Golf "Aegean Storm" will be available on TRENDYGOLF starting Friday, July 5th at 7 am PST. Priced at $150, this release is expected to sell out quickly, so be sure to act fast to secure your pair.

Stay Connected

Follow us on social media and visit our website for more details and updates on the launch. Don’t miss out on this opportunity to add a unique and high-performing piece to your collection. Join the conversation and share your thoughts on the "Aegean Storm" in the comments below.

Elevate your golf game and style with the Nike Air Jordan 1 Low Golf "Aegean Storm," available exclusively at TRENDYGOLF.
